# Version 3.119.2
> **Servicing update** · Released February 6, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.2) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.2)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.2/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.2 ships 3 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll. (#3496)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3497](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3497))

## API Surface

- **Missing tvOS `SKSurface.Create` overloads** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@MartinZikmund](https://github.com/MartinZikmund) ([#3342](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3342))

## Bug Fixes

- **The generator slightly** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3360](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3360))

## Platform

- **Preserve and pack the Android symbols** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3374](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3374))
- **Control Flow Guard for all Windows native DLLs** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@Aguilex](https://github.com/Aguilex) ([#3397](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3397))

## Security

- **BufferSecurityCheck for native DLLs to resolve BinSkim BA2007** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@Aguilex](https://github.com/Aguilex) ([#3404](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3404))

## Preview 3 (February 5, 2026)

Preview 3 carried Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll. (#3496).

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2-preview.2.3...v3.119.2-preview.3.1)

## Preview 2 (January 25, 2026)

Preview 2 carried BufferSecurityCheck for native DLLs to resolve BinSkim BA2007; Control Flow Guard for all Windows native DLLs.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.2-preview.1.2...v3.119.2-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (October 13, 2025)

Preview 1 carried Preserve and pack the Android symbols; missing tvOS `SKSurface.Create` overloads; the generator slightly.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.119.1...v3.119.2-preview.1.2)
